title: Trim Conversation History to Token Budget
description: Trim the oldest messages from a conversation history so the total token estimate fits within a budget, always keeping the system message.
problem: Write trim_history(messages, max_tokens, tokens_per_message) where messages is a list of dicts (first one has role='system'). Drop oldest non-system messages (in order) until len(messages)*tokens_per_message <= max_tokens. Return the trimmed list.
hint: While len(messages) * tokens_per_message > max_tokens and len(messages) > 1: delete messages[1] (the oldest non-system message).
